info.name: Microsoft Azure ConnectivityConfiguration
info.description: The Microsoft Azure Virtual Network Manager Connectivity Configuration API provides a RESTful set of web services that interact with Microsoft Azure Network Manager service to manage your network resources.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Network Networkmanagers Networkmanagername Connectivityconfigurations Configurationname

variable.description: (Required) The name of the resource group.
(Required) The name of the network manager.
(Required) The name of the network manager connectivity configuration.

request.description: Gets a Network Connectivity Configuration, specified by the resource group, network manager name, and connectivity Configuration name

response.name: Get successful. The operation returns the specified Managed Network Connectivity Configuration resource.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Resource Provider error response describing why the operation failed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Put Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Network Networkmanagers Networkmanagername Connectivityconfigurations Configurationname

variable.description: (Required) The name of the resource group.
(Required) The name of the network manager.
(Required) The name of the network manager connectivity configuration.

request.description: Creates/Updates a new network manager connectivity configuration

response.name: Update successful. The operation returns the resulting network manager connectivity configuration.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Create successful. The operation returns the resulting network manager connectivity configuration.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Resource Provider error response describing why the operation failed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Delete Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Network Networkmanagers Networkmanagername Connectivityconfigurations Configurationname

query.description: Deletes the resource even if it is part of a deployed configuration. If the configuration has been deployed, the service will do a cleanup deployment in the background, prior to the delete.

variable.description: (Required) The name of the resource group.
(Required) The name of the network manager.
(Required) The name of the network manager connectivity configuration.

request.description: Deletes a network manager connectivity configuration, specified by the resource group, network manager name, and connectivity configuration name

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: Deletes the resource even if it is part of a deployed configuration. If the configuration has been deployed, the service will do a cleanup deployment in the background, prior to the delete.

response.name: Request successful. The resource does not exist.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: Deletes the resource even if it is part of a deployed configuration. If the configuration has been deployed, the service will do a cleanup deployment in the background, prior to the delete.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Network Networkmanagers Networkmanagername Connectivityconfigurations

query.description: An optional query parameter which specifies the maximum number of records to be returned by the server.

SkipToken is only used if a previous operation returned a partial result. If a previous response contains a nextLink element, the value of the nextLink element will include a skipToken parameter that specifies a starting point to use for subsequent calls.

variable.description: (Required) The name of the resource group.
(Required) The name of the network manager.

request.description: Lists all the network manager connectivity configuration in a specified network manager.

response.name: Get successful. The operation returns all network manager connectivity configuration resources in the specified network manager, in a paginated format

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: An optional query parameter which specifies the maximum number of records to be returned by the server.

SkipToken is only used if a previous operation returned a partial result. If a previous response contains a nextLink element, the value of the nextLink element will include a skipToken parameter that specifies a starting point to use for subsequent calls.

response.name: Error response describing why the operation failed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: An optional query parameter which specifies the maximum number of records to be returned by the server.

SkipToken is only used if a previous operation returned a partial result. If a previous response contains a nextLink element, the value of the nextLink element will include a skipToken parameter that specifies a starting point to use for subsequent calls.
